title: Joe/Selena-Lost In Stereo(Collab Part)
description:
this is my part for TheEpicDiez collab,which im putting together right now.
i wanted to upload this,because sam&liz uploaded their parts as well&i havent uploaded in a while.
i worked really hard on my part,what do you think of it?:D
&&the collab will be up soon,as i said before im putting the parts together.
you excited?:)
